ON MATCH SET source_1.title = coalesce(source_1.title, 'Overview of FiveHands Ransomware variant'),

             malware_1.summary = coalesce(malware_1.summary, 'Novel ransomware variant reported by CISA; uses NTRUEncrypt public-key encryption, deletes Volume Shadow Copies via WMI, encrypts recovery folder files, and writes ransom notes.')
